items.name_en: 【Genuine Leather】#Envelope# Small 21CM
items.name_cn:
【Genuine Leather】#Envelope# Small 21CM
Genuine leather embossed quilted envelope bag, classic is eternal. Stunning V-pattern combined with a diamond-quilted caviar texture. Italian ZP genuine cowhide paired with a bold Y-logo, combining elegance and fashion. It feels like ZP when held! Definitely take it to the counter for comparison! Counter price 14600.... Don't waste money! Buying from us is enough!
Model: 526286~600915 Genuine Leather
Size: 21x13x6cm 168500

items.name_en: 【Genuine Leather】Kate_ Reversible Suede & Smooth Leather, buying one bag is like owning two, great value. The eternal classic Kate, no need to worry about it going out of style, a style suitable for all seasons. Use smooth leather in spring/summer, and suede in autumn/winter! The chain is detachable!

items.name_en: 【Genuine Leather】LE 37 Small Glossy Leather Bag New Arrival, Super Cute Bucket Bag with Handle_New Shape, made of Italian calfskin. The bag features a simple, structured silhouette that looks structured yet not too sharp. It has metal studs at the bottom and a classic iconic metal logo insert clasp. The overall look gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish!

items.name_en: 【Saint Laurent】🌈Premium Exclusive🔥Black/Gold
items.name_cn:
【Saint Laurent】🌈Premium Exclusive🔥Black/Gold
New BEA Tote Bag, leather buckle closure, decorated with LE CASSANDRE. Spacious interior with matching suede lining, featuring one main compartment and an internal zip pocket. Adjustable internal strap, sides can be folded or expanded as needed. Soft deer leather BEA exclusive rare luxury texture, simple appearance paired with this softness creates a lazy look. Sides can also be contracted, offering two forms 👑
Model: 763435
Size: 50x28x18cm

specs.rawTitle:
【Saint Laurent】🌈Premium Exclusive🔥Black/Gold
New BEA Tote Bag, leather buckle closure, decorated with LE CASSANDRE. Spacious interior with matching suede lining, featuring one main compartment and an internal zip pocket. Adjustable internal strap, sides can be folded or expanded as needed. Soft deer leather BEA exclusive rare luxury texture, simple appearance paired with this softness creates a lazy look. Sides can also be contracted, offering two forms 👑
Model: 763435
Size: 50x28x18cm

items.name_en: 🌸 New member of the SOLFERINO box series—phone case 👓
items.name_cn:
🌸 New member of the SOLFERINO box series—phone case 👓
If you want something stylish, simple, and fail-safe, this Solferino is the perfect choice~ As the smallest member of the family, its size is just right to easily fit any size of phone, making it an ideal on-the-go essential. Love it!! Both the look and versatility are on point. Buy it!
And you can happily style it with a full leather look! This attention to detail is spot on for the current casual trend. Highly recommended~
Model: 753963
Dimensions: 18×11×5cm

The Y brand has finally arrived with this year's exploding trend of underarm bags!! The bag's silhouette is simple and structured, looking structured without being too sharp.
